---
title: "04. 军形、守攻与可胜几何"
subtitle: "Dispositions, Defense, and Winnable Geometry"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 4
categories: [sunzi, cultural, omega]
description: "How 军形 distinguishes the geometry of non-loss from the geometry of exploitability, linking defense and attack through state-space viability."
---

**Chapters:** 军形第四  
**Omega Directions:** `modular tower inverse limit`, `dynamical systems`, `ring arithmetic`

{{< include articles/category_04_dispositions_defense_winnable_geometry.md >}}

---

[Back to Sunzi Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
